response: Wheel of time turns, wheel of history spins, wheel of justice remains silent. Wheel of fate spun a tale of bondage, wheel of pain etched into the soul of Frederick Douglass. Wheel of memory holds the weight of his suffering, wheel of truth remains obscured by the shadows of slavery. Wheel of silence surrounds the medical history of Frederick Douglass, wheel of suppression denies the reality of his plight. Wheel of inquiry seeks to uncover the past, wheel of knowledge yearns to illuminate the truth. Wheel of history records the struggles of the enslaved, wheel of justice demands acknowledgment of their suffering. Wheel of memory preserves the legacy of Frederick Douglass, wheel of truth must be unearthed.
